Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\(''/Users/deepakvaidya/.claude/projects/-Users-deepakvaidya-Desktop-new-maropost-Claude/e65a8aa1-2353-4cfc-8615-07c879bb84f1.jsonl'', ''r''\) as f: lines = f.readlines\(\) # Get the last 100 lines and look for assistant messages with edits for i, line in enumerate\(lines[-150:]\): try: data = json.loads\(line\) msg = data.get\(''message'', {}\) role = msg.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if role == ''human'' or role == ''user'': if isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f''--- USER [{i}]: {content[:300]}''\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(f''--- USER [{i}]: {c[""text""][:300]}''\) elif role == ''assistant'': if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\): if c.get\(''type''\) == ''tool_use'' and c.get\(''name''\) == ''Edit'': inp = c.get\(''input'', {}\) print\(f''--- EDIT [{i}]: {inp.get\(""file_path"", """"\)}''\) print\(f'' OLD: {str\(inp.get\(""old_string"", """"\)\)[:200]}''\) print\(f'' NEW: {str\(inp.get\(""new_string"", """"\)\)[:200]}''\) elif c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': txt = c.get\(''text'', ''''\) if txt.strip\(\): print\(f''--- ASST [{i}]: {txt[:300]}''\) except: pass ")
